facts.markup.block: block -> SvelteFacts.markup_block_count + SvelteFacts.markup_blocks: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)
facts.markup.branch: block_branch -> SvelteFacts.markup_branch_count + SvelteFacts.markup_branches: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)
facts.markup.component: start_tag uppercase -> SvelteFacts.markup_component_count + SvelteFacts.markup_components: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)
facts.markup.directive: directive -> SvelteFacts.markup_directive_count + SvelteFacts.markup_directives: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)
facts.markup.element: start_tag lowercase -> SvelteFacts.markup_element_count + SvelteFacts.markup_elements: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)
facts.markup.render: render_tag -> SvelteFacts.markup_render_count + SvelteFacts.markup_renders: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)
facts.markup.special: special_tag -> SvelteFacts.markup_special_count + SvelteFacts.markup_specials: SvelteMarkupNameFact(name, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, span, line)

recovery.each.binding: validate only each source expression before as
recovery.missing.block_close: close at eof or parent block boundary

diagnostics.duplicate.module_script: more than one module script -> svelte/parse/error
diagnostics.duplicate.script: more than one instance script -> svelte/parse/error

facts.descriptor.markup: source outside top blocks -> SvelteMarkup + SvelteFacts.markup_lines + SvelteFacts.markup_block_count + SvelteFacts.markup_branch_count + SvelteFacts.markup_render_count -> Fact(payload.line_count, payload.script_count, payload.script_lines, payload.style_count, payload.style_lines, payload.markup_lines, payload.markup_block_count, payload.markup_branch_count, payload.markup_render_count)
facts.descriptor.module_script: script context module -> SvelteDescriptor.module_script: SvelteBlock(content, start_offset, start_line) + SvelteFacts.script_count + SvelteFacts.script_lines -> Fact(payload.content, payload.start_offset, payload.start_line)
facts.descriptor.script: script without module -> SvelteDescriptor.script: SvelteBlock(content, start_offset, start_line) + SvelteFacts.script_count + SvelteFacts.script_lines -> Fact(payload.content, payload.start_offset, payload.start_line)
facts.descriptor.styles: style* -> SvelteDescriptor.styles + SvelteFacts.style_count + SvelteFacts.style_lines -> Fact(payload.style_count, payload.style_lines)
facts.script.embedded: script content with lang js ts jsx tsx -> TypeScript script block -> Fact(payload.content, payload.lang, payload.tsx, payload.start_offset, payload.start_line)

recovery.descriptor.blocks: preserve well-formed top blocks around malformed blocks
recovery.embedded.skip: skip script languages outside js ts jsx tsx
recovery.missing.close: consume until eof for current top block

spans.embedded.offset: block content start line and byte offset
